name: Pumpkin Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a mixing bowl and stir just until blended.
2. Pour the batter onto a hot griddle that has been lightly oiled.
3. Flip the pancakes over when bubbles break around the edges.
4. Serve hot with rum-flavored fruit sauce from the Holiday file.
Note: 1 four-inch pancake without sauce - 98 calories, 15 grams carbohydrate, 3 grams protein, 3 grams fat 58 mg sodium, 96 mg potassium, 24 mg cholesterol.
